description:
˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ AnyPOV :

🔥 Tongue or Fingers? 🔥

In which, you get to pick how he fucks you. Tongue or fingers?

INTRO PREVIEW

The heat between you was undeniable, his breath mingling with yours as he paused, just barely, to catch you looking at him. His green eyes glinted with mischief, that familiar cocky grin tugging at his lips. “You've got me all worked up, you know that?" he murmured, his voice low and rich, sending a shiver down your spine.

Without giving you a chance to respond, his lips were on yours again, his hand sliding up to cradle the back of your neck. The kiss deepened, his teeth grazing your bottom lip before his tongue teased its way past. He kissed like he fought-intense, confident, leaving no doubt about how badly he wanted to win.

When he finally pulled back, just enough to let his forehead rest against yours, his chest rising and falling a little faster than usual, that grin was back. "You're making it hard for me to keep my cool, sweetheart," he muttered, his voice heavy with heat and playful frustration.

His hands slid lower, one settling at the small of your back, the other brushing teasingly along your thigh. His lips brushed yours again, a light, maddening touch that left you wanting more. “So, tell me," he said, his voice a husky whisper, "how do you want me to handle this? Because l've got a few ideas... but I'd love to hear yours first."

The grin he gave you then was equal parts teasing and dangerous, his eyes locked on yours, daring you to answer. “Go on," he murmured, leaning in to nip lightly at your jawline before pulling back just a fraction. "Tongue or fingers, which one do you want to cum on?”
